title: DEILE worker result v1
description: Structured dispatch payload emitted by the worker pod when a task finishes.

schema_version.description: Schema version identifier for the result payload.

task_id.description: Hexadecimal task identifier generated by the worker.

ok.description: True when the dispatch completed without raising an exception.

elapsed_s.description: Wall-clock duration of the dispatch in seconds.

brief.description: The user's brief that drove the dispatched task.

summary.description: Short textual summary that the worker shared after execution.

files.description: Relevant workspace files captured at the end of the task (max 50).

channel_id.description: Identifier of the channel that triggered the dispatch.

workdir.description: On-disk workspace path used for this task execution.

status_message_id.description: Status message identifier returned by the control-plane (nullable).

finished_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp emitted immediately after the task finished.

resume.description: Optional structured resume context attached when the pipeline is running.

ended.description: Final verdict deduced from ground-truth state.

pr_url.description: PR URL confirmed by the worker (empty if none).

motivo_bloqueio.description: Explicit blocker reported by the agent (empty when not blocked).

motivo_fim_loop.description: How the tool loop terminated from the worker's perspective.

fingerprint.description: SHA-256 fingerprint that ignores meta files like resume journals.

tentativa.description: Attempt counter incremented by the worker for each dispatch.

budget_acumulado_s.description: Accumulated wall-clock budget (seconds) across all attempts.
